title: Grammys 2026: Billie Eilsch Wins Song Of The Year, Says "F*ck ICE"
text:
2026 Grammy Song Of The Year

Winner: Billie Eilsch and Finneas for "Wildflower"

Acceptance Speech Highlights:

Eilsch opened with a political statement: "No one is illegal on stolen land." She expressed optimism about the moment and called for continued activism, stating: "Our voices really do matter, and the people matter, and fuck ICE."

Achievement: This marks the third Song Of The Year win for the sibling duo, who previously won in 2024 and 2020. They became the first artists to achieve three victories in this Grammy category.

Context: Multiple nominees wore "ICE OUT" pins at the ceremony, including Justin Bieber, Brandi Carlile, and others, signaling solidarity with immigration reform advocacy.
